{
  "claims": [
    "Bluff failures are a constant threat to beachgoers and coastal neighborhoods throughout California.",
    "AB 72 ensures there is enough time to consider data-driven outcomes holistically to keep communities safe in the face of sea-level rise.",
    "AB 72 can significantly advance research on the dynamics of cliff collapse along California's coastlines.",
    "The goal of the research is to learn how deformations of cliffs are impacted by tides, large surf, groundwater, and rainfall.",
    "The research aims to determine if signals exist that can forecast where and when an increased risk for cliff collapse is developing.",
